title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five categories: UI, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the Claude Code vs Codex question itself is misguided and recommends focusing on a broader strategic consideration for developers building applications.
